items.headline: NHL erases $1.25 million debt for U.S. veterans
items.description:
NEW YORK – The National Hockey League (NHL) today announced, in partnership with ForgiveCo, it is erasing $1.25 million of debt for U.S. veterans, aiding 1,025 veterans and their families.
Tonight, Dallas Stars forward Jason Robertson will host Specialist Cesar Gonzalez and his family at Game 5 of the 2026

items.headline: Commission Bettman statement on passing of John Garrett
items.description:
NEW YORK -- National Hockey League Commissioner Gary Bettman today released the following statement regarding the passing of John Garrett:
"The National Hockey League family is stunned and saddened by the sudden passing of John Garrett, whose astute analysis took fans – particularly in Western Canada – inside our game

items.headline: Fantasy hockey picks props projections for 2025-26 season
items.description: b NHL.com identifies players to watch for free-to-play fantasy hockey games, props and futures throughout the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs. For more coverage, visit NHL.com/Fantasy.

items.headline: Golden Knights earn gutsy Game 4 OT win against Utah Mammoth
items.description: SALT LAKE CITY -- Shea Theodore walked down the hall, put his stick in the rack and shouted, “Let’s go home!” The defenseman turned right into the Vegas Golden Knights locker room, where his teammates were waiting to celebrate.

items.headline: Vegas Golden Knights Utah Mammoth game 4 recap April 27 2026
items.description: SALT LAKE CITY -- Shea Theodore scored at 19:08 of overtime to give the Vegas Golden Knights a 5-4 win against the Utah Mammoth in Game 4 of the Western Conference First Round at Delta Center on Monday.

items.headline: 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs first round schedule television results
items.description: The 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs are underway. Here is the complete schedule for the first round of the playoffs, including TV information and results:

items.headline: Kris Letang fuels Penguins with crazy goal in Game 5 win
items.description:
PITTSBURGH -- Strange forces seemed to be at play Monday that are giving the Pittsburgh Penguins even more reason to believe they can pull off a miracle comeback against the Philadelphia Flyers.
How else do you explain Kris Letang’s wacky-bounce goal that proved to be the game-winner in the Penguins’

items.headline: Scott Wedgewood takes 'long road' to 2nd round with Colorado
items.description:
LOS ANGELES -- Just more than a week ago, Scott Wedgewood started his first Stanley Cup Playoff game for the Colorado Avalanche, the longtime backup goalie earning the assignment with a strong regular season.
He made 24 saves to help the Avalanche advance with a 5-1 win against the Los

items.headline: Philadelphia Flyers Pittsburgh Penguins Game 5 recap April 27 2026
items.description: PITTSBURGH -- Kris Letang scored the game-winning goal for the second straight game, again helping the Pittsburgh Penguins stay alive with a 3-2 victory against the Philadelphia Flyers in Game 5 of the Eastern Conference First Round at PPG Paints Arena on Monday.

items.headline: NHL start times for Stanley Cup Playoffs 1st Round games on April 29
items.description:
NEW YORK -- The National Hockey League today announced the following updates to the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs First Round schedule:
Wednesday, April 29
• As previously announced, the start time for Game 5 of the First Round Series between the Montreal Canadiens and Tampa Bay Lightning has been set

items.headline: Mario Lemieux Pittsburgh Penguins Flyers Game 5
items.description:
Mario Lemieux always showed up for the Pittsburgh Penguins big games during his playing days, so why would Monday night be any different?
The Hockey Hall of Fame forward showed up for Game 5 of the Eastern Conference First Round against the Philadelphia Flyers at PPG Paints Arena.
Lemieux played

items.headline: George Springer hockey gear batting practice
items.description:
Yes, it's a baseball field. No, there's no ice. But George Springer was ready anyway.
The Toronto Blue Jays outfielder showed up to batting practice at Rogers Centre wearing the sweet hockey jersey that the team gave away at Monday's game.
Not only that, but he added the gear too:

items.headline: Buffalo Sabres expect hardest game yet from Boston Bruins in Game 5
items.description: BUFFALO -- The Buffalo Sabres know Game 5 of the Eastern Conference First Round won’t be easy, not when the Boston Bruins will be trying to save their season at KeyBank Center on Tuesday (7:30 p.m. ET; HBO MAX, truTV, TNT, NESN, MSG-B, SNP, SNO, SNE, TVAS).

items.description:

items.headline: Speculation surrounding Brady Tkachuk leaving Ottawa Senators is nonsense GM says
items.description:
OTTAWA -- Speculation of captain Brady Tkachuk not being on the Ottawa Senators next season is “nonsense,” general manager Steve Staios said Monday.
Two days after the Senators were eliminated in Game 4 of the Eastern Conference First Round by the Carolina Hurricanes, Staios addressed rumblings that Tkachuk -- who
